title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.745 - Oaths, shall administer — examinations — affidavits (certain counties)
text:
58.745.  Oaths, shall administer — examinations — affidavits (certain counties). — The medical examiners shall administer oaths and affirmations, take affidavits, and make examinations as to any matter within the jurisdiction of their respective offices, but the medical examiners shall not be required to summon a jury of inquisition.
(L. 1973 S.B. 122 § 13)
